posts.title: Exploring the Convergence of Artificial Intelligence and Neuroscience
posts.summary: In this article we examine how AI technologies have improved various areas in Neuroscience research and study.
posts.author: Adrien Payong

posts.title: Optimizing AI Models with Quanto on H100 GPUs
posts.summary: In this article discover Quanto a powerful quantization technique designed to optimize deep learning models without compromising the performance of the model.
posts.author: Shaoni Mukherjee
